pi_items.source: Queried the live API (https://liverpool-oncology-production.herokuapp.com/api/drugs) used by the Cancer iChart app and verified that 'Midostaurin' does not exist among the 102 available drugs.
Cannot verify required colors because the target drug Midostaurin is completely absent from the app's live database.
verifier.py precisely implements this scoring distribution, yielding 10 points for the correct drug, 15 points for each color found, and 15 points for systematic scrolling.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Liverpool Cancer iChart app, which fetches drug interaction data from a live Heroku API (liverpool-oncology-production.herokuapp.com). A critical flaw was discovered: the target drug 'Midostaurin' does not exist in the app's live database of 102 available drugs, making it impossible for the agent to select it or verify its interaction colors. The required scoring weights (10 points for drug selection, 15 points per color, 15 points for systematic process) and passing threshold (60) exactly match the logic in verifier.py, but the task itself cannot be completed as requested.
